    void
    GameController.addCardToPlayingStation(String nickname, int id, boolean playedback, Integer X, Integer Y)

    Method
    Description
    int
    PlayingStation.addCard(CardResource card, Integer X, Integer Y, boolean playedback, String nickname)
    This method adds a card to the playing station
    LinkedHashMap
    PlayingStation.isPlayable(boolean playedback, CardResource card, Integer X, Integer Y)
    This method checks if a card can be placed at the given coordinates, Checks if the card is played by front (if back I can always place it), then checks if the corners, of the card that are in the adjacent diagonal, are NULL.
